en: Okay, could you give Hilary and, um... No, don't bring Hilary. Stephanie.
ko: 알겠어, 힐러리랑, 음... 아니, 힐러리는 빼줘. 스테파니.

en: Stephanie, some cucumber at 2.30. Stephanie! Thanks. Um, Claire, just tell me where you are. What the hell has happened?
ko: 스테파니, 2시 30분에 오이 좀 줘. 스테파니! 고마워. 음, 클레어, 어디 있는지 말해줘. 도대체 무슨 일이야?

en: No, just come! I need you to...
Tell the truth. It's horrendous. It's horrendous. It's modern. Don't lie! I'm not!
ko: 진실을 말해. 끔찍해. 끔찍해. 현대적이야. 거짓말하지 마! 안 해!

en: I look like a pencil. You... You don't look like a... Don't laugh! It's okay!
ko: 나는 연필 같아. 너... 너는 그런 것 같지 않아... 웃지 마! 괜찮아!

en: It's not okay! I'm gonna lose my job!
You won't lose your job, it's cool! It's not cool! It's edgy! Oh, fuck off! Oh, it's cheap! It's unsalvageable!
ko: 직장을 잃지 않아, 괜찮아! 괜찮지 않아! 세련됐어! 아, 꺼져! 아, 싸구려야! 회복 불가능해!
클레어, 이건 프랑스 거야. 정말? 응.

en: Oh, he gave me champagne before he ruined my life.
ko: 그가 내 인생을 망치기 전에 샴페인을 줬어.

en: Did you go to Anthony? Claire! I know! What?
You remember what happened to me!
